reviews.review_description:
Despite devs resonding that they'll get to the bugs MORE THAN A YEAR AGO, the bugs are still there.
Level 5 doesn't go beyond the first section, and level 6 has a piece missing.

It is an interesting concept but there seems to be so many bugs especially with chapter 5 and 6 I can't continue on 5:00 in fact when I start over again no Pieces come so I can't continue. If fixed I would give it a 5star

I spent hours playing the new version (Chapter VI Skylab) and a puzzle piece connected where it should not. There is no undo. This cannot be fixed except by starting the WHOLE game over again and losing all progress.  You must reset the game which is a real pain.

While I complement the game developers for the first version, the add on chapter VI is flawed and I confirmed all connections with AI. Skylab does not play the way the first 5 chapters performed.

I understand there was likely a lot of pressure from gamers to develop another add-on module.

It is a disappointment that more time was not spent testing Chapter VI.

reviews.review_title: Fun game and makes perfect use of VR
reviews.review_description: I completed it in around 3 hours at a slow pace and it was good fun! I can also confirm all the pieces are there, but would suggest if you can't find a piece look everywhere ... even look above your head. The only issue that I found was the hints could be incorrect.

It pains me to write a bad review here, the game is a nice chill out experience BUUUUT

It’s fundamentally broken with a critical bug that other reviewers have mentioned months ago, preventing progress 80% through the game, yes it’s kind of skippable but that’s not the point.

Also to call this a narrative puzzle game is a major misrepresentation, there is no plot. A mute giant gives you puzzle pieces, end of. Not exactly Shakespeare.

reviews.review_title: Hopefully they will fix this soon
reviews.review_description: Love this game but you cant finish it as its missing a piece in the final game. And level 5 is still not fixed. Come on developers fix this or return our money please.

reviews.review_title: Massive issue with level 5 - multiple us
reviews.review_description:
As per other reviews, I have reached level 5, completed the first section, and then something goes wrong because you don’t get any pieces to put together. It just stops. 

This is clearly affecting multiple users but with no way to report bugs and a seeming lack of developer response, I am very frustrated.

This is an incredibly beautiful, original and relaxing game, and if this gets fixed then this will become a 5 star review, but it has to be looked at and fixed!

developer_response.body: Hello, thanks for playing Shores of Loci. We'll look into this issue as soon as possible. Thanks.

reviews.review_description: There is an extra piece.  It doesn't belong.  I can't find a hint button in the new world

reviews.review_title: Lovely Little Game — but some problems
reviews.review_description:
This is an update to a previous review which I’m leaving here. I was happy to hear of the new chapter and as I had already started over I continued with where I left off but had issues after finishing the first section of chapter five. But then there were no more pieces. Maybe they’re hidden, but I haven’t found them anywhere. So far chapter six is working ok, and is as delightful as the previous chapters have been. I’d like to know where the missing pieces are though. Also I couldn’t find anyway to report problems so decided to add to my review.

This game is a wonderful addition to 3D puzzling. The graphics of this imagined land and the movement of the little inhabitants as their land is rebuilt make this a game worth doing.  And the fact this was created by a small indie studio makes it even more remarkable. I understand that it takes time to build more levels at the quality already established, but it is sad to reach and complete the final level. Would only wish that there are more levels to come. Worth waiting for.iI

Similar to previous reviewers. The new puzzle seems to have missing pieces, which stops you from completing the puzzle. You have to quit the game and reboot the Quest 2 to restore the pieces. It has just failed again on a different section of the puzzle, very frustrating. NOT HAPPY🙁

reviews.review_title: The new chapter has caused issues.
reviews.review_description:
I am very fond of this game and looked forward to the new chapter.
The game started at my last save point, where I had completed chapter 5, so I could start directly with chapter six.  I did the first puzzle in chapter 6, the game crashed, and erased all my game progress. 
So, I played through the whole game again.  When i got back to the 5th chapter, I couldn't complete the 2nd puzzle, because there appeared to be a piece missing.  I quit and restarted the game a few times and eventually discovered that the piece was stuck in the floor. But, by then, the puzzle had glitched so that all the pieces were overlapping and looked like a ball of trash!
I finally got to Chapter 6 and as with chapter 5, some of the puzzle pieces got stuck in the floor a couple of times while I was playing. 
I think part of the problem is that when the pieces initially move towards you, they can bounce off each other. Also, when you are working on a puzzle, the pieces can bounce off each other and go through the floor.  
A quick fix would be to make the pieces also bounce off the floor instead of going through it. Another useful setting would be to clear individual chapters, instead of having to clear the whole game. 






This is essentially a 3D jigsaw game, but with a little back story.  It has an impressive sense of scale, and while playing, it feels like a nice place to be. 
It is super chilled, great visuals, calming music and quite challenging. 
It is a bit short, so I hope there will be more chapters soon.

developer_response.body: Thanks very much for your feedback. We will look into this issue.

reviews.review_description: I enjoyed completing the puzzles in chapters 1-4,  the first section of chapter 5 and all of chapter 6. However I was not able to complete the rest of chapter 5 because the puzzle pieces did not appear?

Had a lot of fun with this game.
Sadly it is not a very long game.
Wish it woud be longer.

First, thank you developers for this creative puzzle VR game. I enjoyed playing it very much.
Please continue to add more gameplay to it if possible because it is fun and enjoyable game. 
I do recommand this to everyone to enjoy.   More please. 👍🙏🫶

Beautiful game with stunning scenery and great relaxing music. The transitions are really done well and everything fits together. The puzzles get more difficult as the game goes on and some are pretty challenging. The puzzles themselves are really interesting in their architecture, I just hope they bring more out soon! Gameplay is about 2-3 hours and it’s worth the cost. Great way to relax but keep the brain cells working. 
Tip: If you like the game Puzzling Places, you’ll love this one too - similar process with the same satisfaction when you finish the task. And if you like this game, try Puzzling Places! :)

reviews.review_title: very very relaxing and fun brain tickler
reviews.review_description:
I don't expect too much from puzzle games, as they too often try to be clever .... or create anxiety due to poor puzzle logic ... but this one is a very surprising treat. I've found myself replaying after solving everything simply for the immersing and relaxing experience. The game play is intuitive, the soundscaping is quite zen, and the visuals are different in a way that made me think , "Oh, okay this is what Quest is all about". 

 If you've played enough Quest 2 games, you know what I'm talking about  -- they're usually a letdown and better experienced on a computer. For me, Walkabout Mini Golf, Superhot VR and this game are the standouts that utilize the VR experience in the best way.  It's only $15. Go ahead and pull the trigger already.  :)

The puzzles are cool, but there is no story here. It feels
Like false advertisement. Great puzzler, zero narrative or adventure.

Being totally addicted to Puzzling Places I really didn’t know what to expect.  I was totally blown away and spent the next three hours thoroughly enjoying myself.  If you enjoy 3-D puzzling this is a MUST!!!

Shores of Loci is breathtakingly lovely and a satisfying puzzler taboot. A great place to spend some relaxing, dare I say meditative time. It just fills you up with its graphics and although folks who prefer rapid fire action may not dig it as much as I do, it’s a great way to wind your hectic day down. A truly enjoyable experience, and you get terrific bang for your buck as well.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind words. This is exactly why we made this puzzle game.

reviews.review_description: It's addictive and fun! I was enjoying playing this game until my oldest child stole it away from me. They finished the game and went back again the next day to play it all over! Can't wait for more levels!

A very relaxing and relaxing game with beautiful graphics for every puzzle lover.

The objects that we arrange, after folding, they grow and fit as an element of the surroundings and it looks sensational.

Puzzles are not the easiest and you have to strain your gray cells to fit everything together
I recommend

Kick back, relax and lose yourself in beautiful new lands!
The graphics on this game are so beautiful! I love the transitions between levels, the colors, the soundtracks, and being transported to beautiful lands. The puzzles are fun and challenging but not so hard that you have to go looking for outside help. It's a fun and relaxing game! The only thing that it needs is more puzzles and more levels!!
Incredible.

Att first glance it's every simple, few large blocks to piece together. But it's almost impossible.

Eventually I realized that you need to put them together in the specific order as thought by the developers.

Pieces don't match up as smooth as expected, sometimes a road on one piece doesn't continue on the next.

Connection points are sometimes obvious, sometimes unmatched as when the poles on one part matches poles of other dimensions and angles on the other part.

The map design makes it hard to see how pieces match, you need to focus on small details.

Once you see how to connect the pieces you barely move then together before the automation takes over which takes away your feeling of putting them together.
The pieces moves in a wobbly manner, they are following your hands but with a delay, they have a kinetic memory so you have to hold them still for a while before letting go.

Pieces collide and you accidentally knock another piece away behind you.

The world is soothing but the wait for the next set of pieces can get frustrating.

I had probably expected a more living version of a classic puzzle game but realized the simple puzzle game is all I wanted.

With all this said, much is above is by design and it works as intended. No bugs or glitches.
Maybe I had different expectations but I find it extremely boring

If we could only get work to be like this. Very smart way to fully engage the user without inducing any motion sickness. Captivating puzzles with gorgeous detail. Sweeping, graceful and moving transition scenes. Fun place to hang out. More of this please.

But more aggravating than not.  Abrasive sounds of concrete rubbing together and just cumbersome handling the pieces. I finished the first puzzle and started the second and realized I was just over it.  Not for me.  I'll go back to Puzzling Places where I can daydream as I work.  Sorry.....

developer_response.body: Hi! Sorry to hear that Shores of Loci is not for you. Did you try the SFX option to turn off the sounds during gameplay?

reviews.review_description: Brilliant game. I've never give 5 stars .before. but this game I give 10 stars .I jush whish the designers  makes more puzzles to had on to this game .
Very cool fun puzzle game - graphics are awesome

The graphics are amazing!! This is a new spin on 3D puzzles :) I love that, if you need one, you have the ability to use a hint to figure out how to get pieces together! 

If you love puzzles, you'll love this game!!

reviews.review_title: This Is The Most Beautiful Game!
reviews.review_description: I am so impressed by the visual and sound details in this game! The snow falling, the water sounds, the time warp into different worlds felt cinematic! It always left me relaxed and in such a good mood. I can’t say enough about how beautiful this whole thing is. Well done to the developers!

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for the kind words, and we're so happy you enjoy the game. You're making our day with your review!

reviews.review_description: Like most others, I did like this game, but  it stalled on the second level after completing  the puzzle. Is there another level after the frozen village? Seems a bit pricey for just 2 levels when the lobby area shows more tiles on the platform. Or is there something I am missing?

developer_response.body: Hi! There are in total 5 chapters and the sixth is nearly ready. Did you get stuck? You can reset the level or maybe you are missing one puzzle piece? Please reach out to loci@miketeevee.com if you need help.

reviews.review_title: It’s all fun and games until…
reviews.review_description: you hear the horn and the creepy sound of the black void sucking you in. It’s relaxing and then all of a sudden the music shifts, and so does your mood (and anxiety).
Beautiful puzzle game relaxing a bit short and I am stuck at level 2 last bit forever would be nice has some hints !
Puzzles are challenging but easy enough to solve. Just wish I could explore the worlds after I finish them

I really enjoyed the beautifull worlds that these puzzles are set in. For me, the difficulty was just right. Close enough to frustration level, that you are not speeding through the puzzles and that each link you make get’s you that rewarding feeling of achievement. Great and unique VR game!

Colorful entertainment in a relaxing way
Not to hard or easy. Can't beat it for the money
It's fun and relaxing.  I'm hoping they make more.

developer_response.body:
Hi, 
Thank you so much! Yes, we are working on more Worlds!

reviews.review_description: I LOVED this and will most likely reset it and do it again. If you like putting together puzzles (actual puzzles), you likely enjoy this. I hope we’ll see add-on packs or Loci 2 or some such. ￼Can’t rave enough about it.

I absolutely love playing this puzzle game! It's beautifully made and the puzzles are fun and challenging. The music is peaceful and relaxing. Every time I get into the game, I lose track of time with how fun it is. It is a quick game. Didn't take long to complete. I love puzzles and this is the most unique experience I've ever had with a VR version. Highly recommend it!
